forbidden_inputs: unordered raw table scans with no typed lineage basis

notes: Persist exactly one authoritative dashboard per governed lineage.
The dashboard is a read model, not mutation-side truth.
rows.retention_boundary: Persists until the governed lineage ages out under policy; never reconstructed from log history.
rows.retry_or_resolution_posture: Projection reads typed lifecycle state; it does not infer resolution from logs, notes, or message copy.
rows.source_heading_or_logical_block: Governing Model, Read-Model Rules, and Construction Rule
rows.visibility_boundary: Operator-facing lineage inspection only; downstream surfaces derive from the persisted projection and explicit visibility classes.

notes: First lineage entry equals root_error_ref and last entry equals current_error_ref.
